name: trading
description: Handmade Binance trading interface with a Fastify backend, SolidJS UI, and reusable bot package.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @trading/server" "npm run dev -w @trading/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @trading/bot-algo && npm run build -w @trading/server && npm run build -w @trading/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @trading/bot-algo && npm run typecheck -w @trading/server && npm run typecheck -w @trading/web
